task_completion.description: Verify the event title is set to 'Database Migration'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A title or subject text field displaying the exact text 'Database Migration'.

task_completion.description: Verify the event starts on Friday of next week at 11:00 PM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date/time picker or event detail showing the start day as Friday and the time as 11:00 PM or 23:00.

task_completion.description: Verify the event ends on the following Saturday at 3:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date/time picker or event detail showing the end day as Saturday and the time as 3:00 AM or 03:00.

task_completion.description: Verify the event location is set to 'Server Room'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Location' field containing the text 'Server Room'.

task_completion.description: Verify the event description is set to 'Critical infrastructure upgrade. Systems will be offline.'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A description or notes text area containing the text 'Critical infrastructure upgrade. Systems will be offline.'

task_completion.description: Verify the event is saved and spans exactly 4 hours across midnight.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The saved event visible on a calendar view spanning from 11:00 PM to 3:00 AM, or an event summary confirming a 4-hour duration.

integrity.description: The agent used a legitimate calendar or scheduling application (e.g., Odoo Calendar) rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a calendar interface, scheduling form, or standard application UI, not a plain text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or python scripts are visible being used to directly inject the event into a database.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the event creation form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of filling out fields (title, dates, location, description) rather than just a final state appearing magically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The event must be named 'Database Migration'. The location must be 'Server Room'. The start time is 23:00 (11:00 PM) on Friday, and the end time is 03:00 (3:00 AM) on Saturday. The duration must be exactly 4.0 hours. The description must contain 'Critical infrastructure'.
